formulas.name: Drawee
formulas.formula: The person in whose favour the bill of exchange is drawn

formulas.name: Drawer
formulas.formula: The person who draws the bill of exchange

formulas.name: Drawee's Duty
formulas.formula: To accept or to refuse the bill of exchange

formulas.name: Drawer's Duty
formulas.formula: To draw the bill of exchange, fill it up properly and get it accepted by the drawee.

formulas.name: Acceptance
formulas.formula: The drawee's promise to pay the amount of the bill of exchange at the maturity date.

formulas.name: Date of Acceptance
formulas.formula: The date on which the drawee accepts the bill of exchange.

formulas.name: Date of Maturity
formulas.formula: The date on which the bill of exchange becomes due for payment.

formulas.name: Unconditional Acceptance
formulas.formula: An acceptance that is not qualified in any way.

formulas.name: Conditional Acceptance
formulas.formula: An acceptance that is qualified in some way, such as 'on presentation of invoice'.

formulas.name: Qualified Acceptance
formulas.formula: An acceptance that is conditional on the fulfillment of a certain condition.

formulas.name: Protest
formulas.formula: A formal declaration by a notary public or other authorized officer that the bill of exchange has not been accepted or paid.

formulas.name: Protest for Non-Acceptance
formulas.formula: The formal declaration that the bill of exchange has not been accepted by the drawee.

formulas.name: Protest for Non-Payment
formulas.formula: The formal declaration that the bill of exchange has not been paid by the drawee.

formulas.name: Notice of Protest
formulas.formula: A written notification to the parties involved that the bill of exchange has been protested.

formulas.name: Drawer's Right to Stop Payment
formulas.formula: The drawer's right to stop payment on the bill of exchange.

formulas.name: Drawer's Right to Demand Acceptance
formulas.formula: The drawer's right to demand acceptance from the drawee.

formulas.name: Drawee's Right to Refuse Acceptance
formulas.formula: The drawee's right to refuse acceptance of the bill of exchange.

formulas.name: Holder's Right to Demand Payment
formulas.formula: The holder's right to demand payment from the drawee.

formulas.name: Holder's Right to Sue the Drawer
formulas.formula: The holder's right to sue the drawer in case of non-payment.

formulas.name: Holder's Right to Sue the Drawee
formulas.formula: The holder's right to sue the drawee in case of non-payment.
